channel.title: Narrative Design on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Narrative Design on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Fallout vs. Arcanum Story States
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Fallout versus Arcanum’s story states.

item.title: Tone In Video Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about pickling.

item.title: Endings
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about endings.

item.title: Neutral Factions
item.description: Hello everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about neutral factions.

item.title: NPC Reaction Pros And Cons
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about NPC reaction pros and cons.

item.title: NPCs Triggering Each Other
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about NPC’s triggering each other.

item.title: NPC Reactions
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about NPC reaction.

item.title: Story Telling And Player Agency
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about storytelling and player agency.

item.title: Sometimes I Hate VO
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about how sometimes I hate voiceover, hate.

item.title: Editing Your Game Story
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Axion as a hypothetical particle to explain dark matter through their ability to violate CP symmetry in Quantum chromodynamics — wait, wrong Channel.

item.title: Writing Evil Characters
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about writing evil characters.

item.title: Writing Good NPCs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about writing good NPCs.

item.title: Touchy Subjects
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about touchy subjects.

item.title: Shopping Cart Theory
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about shopping cart Theory.

item.title: Using Mechanics For Storytelling
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about using Mechanics for storytelling, and

item.title: Subverting Tropes
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about subverting tropes because I did a video on tropes that I think get overused.

item.title: Designing Mechanics First
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about the idea of Designing mechanics first for your game before doing anything else.

item.title: Canonical Endings
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about canonical endings, and by canonical endings I mean the ending of the of a game that is considered to be the right ending, or the correct ending, or the true ending or, at the very minimum, the ending the developer expected you to have.

item.title: Grey Morality
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about gray morality.

item.title: How To Gate Non-Linear Stories
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about how to gate nonlinear stories.

item.title: Gameplay's Influence On Story
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about game plays: influence on story.

item.title: Implementing Endgame Slides
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk to you about implementing endgame slides.

item.title: Story Vs Game Design
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about Story versus game design or, as sherner asks, what is more important for a game, story or game design?

item.title: Game Lore
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about game lore.

item.title: Villains
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about villains in my appropriately lit villains Lair.

item.title: Fallout: The Original Intro Story
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about the original story intro to Fallout.

item.title: Tropes
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about tropes, specifically tropes in computer role-playing games, including the ones

item.title: Arcanum Generated Dialog
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about arcanum’s generated dialogue system, and I know

item.title: Storytelling in MMORPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about storytelling in massively multiplayer online RPGs.

item.title: Humor In Video Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about humor in video games, but before I do I want to point out

item.title: Everything I learned from Disneyland
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to do something a little different.
